category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask / KN95) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95) to Azerbaijan market (AZSTAND/AzStandard national conformity certification, GOST-adopted standards). Azerbaijan is not an EAEU member; TR CU 019/2011 does not apply.

title.en: China-to-Azerbaijan PPE Respirator (FFP Mask / KN95) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器出口阿塞拜疆（KN95/FFP）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器出口亞塞拜然（KN95/FFP）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Azerbaijan national requirements under the AZSTAND/AzStandard conformity certification regime. Azerbaijan is not an EAEU member; TR CU 019/2011 and EAEU technical regulations do not apply. Applicable standards are GOST-adopted national standards (e.g. GOST 12.4.191 / AZS equivalents of EN 149), with conformity certification issued by the national standards authority. Entry point: Baku (Caspian). No horizontal RoHS-type regime applies.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与阿塞拜疆国家要求对照。阿塞拜疆非欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员，TR CU 019/2011及EAEU技术法规不适用。适用标准为AZSTAND/阿塞拜疆标准局采用的国家标准（如GOST 12.4.191/EN 149等效AZS标准），合格认证由国家标准机构颁发。入境口岸：巴库（里海）。无横向RoHS类限制。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與亞塞拜然國家要求對照。亞塞拜然非歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員，TR CU 019/2011及EAEU技術法規不適用。適用標準為AZSTAND/亞塞拜然標準局採用的國家標準（如GOST 12.4.191/EN 149等效AZS標準），合格認證由國家標準機構頒發。入境口岸：巴庫（裏海）。無橫向RoHS類限制。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Azerbaijan regulatory requirements for PPE respirators are subject to change; exporters and importers should verify current national standards, AZSTAND certification requirements, and customs practice with qualified regulatory professionals in Azerbaijan before shipment. TR CU / EAEU framework does not apply to Azerbaijan. Content provided for general orientation only.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。阿塞拜疆PPE呼吸器法规要求可能变化；出口商和进口商在出货前应与阿塞拜疆合格法规专业人士核验现行国家标准、AZSTAND认证要求及海关实践。TR CU/EAEU框架不适用于阿塞拜疆。本内容仅供一般参考。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。亞塞拜然PPE呼吸器法規要求可能變化；出口商和進口商在出貨前應與亞塞拜然合格法規專業人士核驗現行國家標準、AZSTAND認證要求及海關實踐。TR CU/EAEU框架不適用於亞塞拜然。本內容僅供一般參考。

answer_first.en: Azerbaijan is not an EAEU member — TR CU 019/2011 (EAEU PPE Technical Regulation) does NOT apply. Respiratory PPE for the Azerbaijan market is regulated under the national AZSTAND/AzStandard regime using GOST-adopted standards (e.g. GOST 12.4.191 / AZS EN 149 equivalents). Conformity certification from the national certification body is required; self-declaration is generally not accepted for regulated PPE categories. Chinese GB 2626 (KN95) test reports do not automatically satisfy AZS national standard requirements — separate testing against the applicable AZS standard is needed. There is no horizontal RoHS-type restriction under Azerbaijan's national PPE regime. Grid: 220/380 V, 50 Hz — matches China, no electrical adaptation required for passive PPE.
answer_first.zh: 阿塞拜疆非欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员——TR CU 019/2011（EAEU PPE技术法规）不适用。阿塞拜疆市场的呼吸防护PPE依据国家AZSTAND/AzStandard体制监管，采用GOST采纳标准（如GOST 12.4.191/AZS EN 149等效标准）。须取得国家认证机构的合格认证；受监管PPE类别通常不接受自我声明。中国GB 2626（KN95）检测报告不自动满足AZS国家标准要求——须针对适用AZS标准进行单独测试。阿塞拜疆国家PPE体制下无横向RoHS类限制。电网：220/380V、50Hz——与中国一致，被动式PPE无需电气适配。
answer_first.zht: 亞塞拜然非歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員——TR CU 019/2011（EAEU PPE技術法規）不適用。亞塞拜然市場的呼吸防護PPE依據國家AZSTAND/AzStandard體制監管，採用GOST採納標準（如GOST 12.4.191/AZS EN 149等效標準）。須取得國家認證機構的合格認證；受監管PPE類別通常不接受自我聲明。中國GB 2626（KN95）檢測報告不自動滿足AZS國家標準要求——須針對適用AZS標準進行單獨測試。亞塞拜然國家PPE體制下無橫向RoHS類限制。電網：220/380V、50Hz——與中國一致，被動式PPE無需電氣適配。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
